channel.title: SevenAtSevenPolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SevenAtSevenPolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: State Department to pull additional passports from parents who owe child support
item.description: The Trump administration plans to revoke passports of parents owing significant child support, restricting travel until payments are made under expand...

item.title: Will the AI Revolution Foment a Revolution?
item.description: It’s quite possible that the apocalyptic economic warnings are overblown. But what do free marketeers do if the doomers are right?

item.title: 6 years after political comeback, Biden faces cold shoulder from fellow Democrats
item.description: Biden's political influence wanes as Democratic candidates distance themselves from the former president ahead of 2024 races, marking a stark shift.

item.title: The CEO of Capgemini has a warning. You might be thinking about AI all wrong
item.description: Aiman Ezzat warns that AI FOMO could cost companies dearly if they treat it as a hype instead of a true business transformation.

item.title: Trump Busts Another Taboo
item.description: It used to be that U.S. presidents didn’t pop off on every Tom, Dick, and Harry.

item.title: Welcome to the ‘E-shaped’ economy: Wealth gap is no longer between just high and low earners, the middle class is also struggling out on its own
item.description: A look at BofA's data shows the shape of the consumer economy is no longer a K—if we're sticking with the alphabet theme, one might suggest an 'E' is ...

item.title: Ohio legislature calls on Congress to abolish the U.S. Department of Education
item.description: Ohio state lawmakers passed a joint resolution Wednesday calling on Congress to abolish the U.S. Department of Education.

item.title: 213 Democrats Vote Against Requiring Voter ID And Proof Of Citizenship To Vote
item.description: Nearly every single Democrat voted against legislation that would require documentary proof of citizenship to register to vote and photo ID for voting...

item.title: Member of Trump's Religious Liberty Commission ousted in dispute over antisemitism
item.description: A member of the federal Religious Liberty Commission has been ousted after a hearing this week that featured tense exchanges on the definition of anti...

item.title: 3 factors that will separate the ‘SaaSpocalypse’ winners from losers
item.description: Also: All the news and watercooler chat from Fortune.

item.title: Virginia’s Gerrymandering Vandalism
item.description: The Virginia gerrymander would create an extreme deep-blue House caucus in a purple state based upon winning one election cycle.

item.title: Minivan mom puts Dem incumbent on notice in top GOP target district: 'She has done nothing for us'
item.description: Carrie Buck, a mother and former school principal, is gaining massive momentum in a critical race to oust Democratic Rep. Dina Titus from what the GOP...

item.title: White House reaffirms any illegal immigrant can be deported as Trump team zeroes in on ‘worst of the worst’
item.description: Border czar Tom Homan said criminal illegal aliens are top priority for deportation to maintain public support for Trump's immigration crackdown.

item.title: High Fashion Wasn’t Easy in Imperial Spain
item.description: Fabrics, jewelry, and tailoring were tops, but the Hispanic Society shows us that looking good could be hazardous to your health.

item.title: Judge frees three illegal-immigrant murderers from detention; calls convictions 'irrelevant'
item.description: A federal judge ordered Homeland Security to release three illegal immigrants with homicide convictions on their criminal records and a fourth illegal...

item.title: House Republican Greg Steube introduces bill to nix controversial H-1B visa program
item.description: GOP Rep. Greg Steube of the Sunshine State has introduced a bill that would nix the United States' H-1B visa program that he suggests impacts American...

item.title: Senate backs compelling D.C. to adopt no tax on tips, overtime in initial vote
item.description: The Senate gave initial approval Wednesday to a bill forcing the District to adopt a series of tax cuts included in the One Big Beautiful Bill, from w...

item.title: A Congressman’s Five Questions for Munich
item.description: This week’s Munich Security Conference comes at a consequential moment for both U.S. security planning and the future of the Western alliance.

item.title: Some folks on Wall Street think yesterday’s U.S. jobs number was ‘implausible’ and thus due for a downward correction
item.description: Some analysts are worrying that the latest number might be wrong, and that the level of job creation in America is lower than the stats suggest.

item.title: How Trump erased the story of George Washington’s slave, Ona Judge, who fled from Philadelphia to freedom
item.description: In late January, the National Park Service dismantled the slavery exhibit at Philadelphia Independence National Historic Park.

item.title: Protesters in multiple states press Target to oppose the immigration crackdown in Minnesota
item.description: Activists planned protests at more than two dozen Target stores around the United States on Wednesday to pressure the discount retailer into taking a ...

item.title: Trans School Shooter In Canada Is Latest In Growing Epidemic Of Transgender Violence
item.description: A mentally ill man cosplaying as a woman reportedly shot and killed six people at a school in British Columbia after murdering his mother and stepbrot...

item.title: Conservatives Can’t Beat Democrats Until They Defeat The RINOs In Their Own Party First
item.description: Until conservatives root out the rot within their own party, the D.C. status quo will continue to remain the same.

item.title: Bishops Call On Notre Dame To Rescind Pro-Abortion Professor’s Appointment To Leadership
item.description: The appointment is merely the latest attack on the Catholic identity of Notre Dame in recent years.

item.title: Docs Reveal LA Teachers Union Plot To Use Schools For ICE ‘Resistance’ With Whistles, Group Chats
item.description: The docs show the union attempting to create an anti-ICE surveillance state in schools, complete with patrols and Signal group chats.

item.title: AI Is Reshaping Bank Risk
item.description: AI is exposing the limits of legacy bank controls, making governance quality critical to resilience and investor confidence. The post AI Is Reshaping ...

item.title: What Makes an Ideal Leveraged Buyout Candidate?
item.description: In competitive PE markets, successful LBOs depend on durable business models, recurring cash flows, defensible market positions, and disciplined targe...

item.title: Rethinking Household Asset Allocation Under Capital Constraints
item.description: Leveraged ETFs aren’t about more risk, they’re about using less capital to achieve a desired risk profile in household portfolios. The post Rethinking...

item.title: Stockholm’s Capital Markets Success: More Than Meatballs
item.description: Stockholm’s capital-market success reflects more than IPOs and PE activity. It offers a case study in how culture, institutions, and incentives shape ...

item.title: Where AI Ends and Investment Judgment Begins
item.description: AI’s growing capabilities challenge traditional investment skill, shifting competitive advantage toward governance, process, and judgment. The post Wh...
